# 2026-04-04 - @2think Log

## Entry 1
### Human Prompt
Perform @2think discovery for project `prj0000122` on branch `prj0000122-jwt-refresh-token-support`, inspect the current backend auth implementation, and update the think artifact plus tracking artifacts without implementing code.

### Agent Response
Validated the branch gate, read the project overview and idea, inspected `backend/auth.py`, `backend/app.py`, `backend/session_manager.py`, `backend/memory_store.py`, `tests/test_backend_auth.py`, and `tests/test_backend_worker.py`, and compared three implementation directions. Recommended a backend-owned session-store approach with opaque rotating refresh tokens plus short-lived access JWTs, because current backend support is validation-only and lacks any issuance, rotation, or revocation state.

## Entry 2
### Human Prompt
Act as @2think for project `prj0000124-llm-gateway` on branch `prj0000124-llm-gateway`, inspect repository architecture and produce a complete option space for an LLM Gateway with recommendation, phased roadmap, and @3design decision points.

### Agent Response
Validated branch and project boundary, inspected core runtime/provider/routing/resilience/context modules plus backend auth/memory/tracing integrations, and gathered prior-art from ADRs and archived think artifacts. Produced four architecture options (in-process, sidecar service, hybrid split-plane, and adapter-over-existing), each with lifecycle pipeline, SWOT, security risk-to-testability mapping, complexity/cost, and migration path. Recommended Option C (hybrid split-plane) for phase-one execution due to best balance of governance, scalability, and phased performance evolution.
